resources.string: Tap the icon again to directly start typing a search term.
This will delete all of your browsing history. Are you sure?
No results found in reading lists
To help protect against automated spam, please enter the words that appear below
Can\'t see the image? Request an account
This will log you out on all devices where you are currently logged in. Do you want to continue?

Vanishing is a last resort and should only be used when you wish to stop editing forever and also to hide as many of your past associations as possible.

Account deletion on Wikipedia is done by changing your account name to make it so others cannot recognize your contributions in a process called account vanishing. Vanishing does not guarantee complete anonymity or remove contributions to the projects.
Track what you\'ve been reading here.
Some articles in history may not be viewable while offline.
Search and read the free encyclopedia in your language
This app was translated by the volunteer translators at translatewiki.net.
Source code available on GitHub under the Apache 2.0 License. Unless otherwise specified, content is available under a Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike License.
The article has been opened in a background tab.
Are you sure you want to clear your search history?
Could not open web page (no browser app found).
The fastest way to search Wikipedia
The best articles Wikipedia has to offer
Enable or disable loading of images in pages. Uncheck this setting if your Internet connection is slow, or if your data plan is limited.
You have "Download only over Wi-Fi" turned on in settings. Do you want to allow using your mobile data plan for this download only?
Permission to write to storage on your device is required for saving images.
Are you sure you want to close all tabs?
Response from the server was not formatted correctly.
This title relates to more than one page:
Article cannot be loaded while offline.
Hint: Add the article to a reading list and it will be downloaded once you\'re back online.
You are reading an offline version of this article saved on %s.
Could not find any apps that provide directions.
Show a quick preview of articles when tapping on links.
Automatically collapse tables in articles, such as infoboxes, references, and notes.
Temporarily hide images while reading articles. Tap a hidden image to reveal it.
Sorry, voice recognition is not available.
The Android System WebView is currently being updated. Please try again in a moment.
Wikipedia does not have a user page with this exact name. In general, this page should be created and edited by %2$s. If in doubt, please verify that \"%3$s\" exists.
Cannot connect to Wikipedia. Check your network connection, or try again later
Save data usage by loading articles that are available offline rather than always loading the latest version of an article
You are using a temporary account

plurals.name: temp_account_created
plurals.item: Temporary account %1$s was created after your edit was published. It will expire in %2$d day.
Temporary account %1$s was created after your edit was published. It will expire in %2$d days.

resources.string: You are using a temporary account. Your edit will be attributed to %1$s. Learn more.

You are currently using a temporary account. Edits made with the temporary account %1$s will not be carried over to your permanent account when you log in. Log in or create an account to get credit to your username, among other benefits.
This will log you out of your temporary account. Do you want to continue?
Drag the slider to change the size of the text that is used when reading articles. To set the text size throughout the rest of the app, change your system text size.
Switch to using the app\'s dark color theme
Hides edit features and bottom toolbar on scroll
Saved %s. Do you want to add it to a list?
All good! %s already contains all articles.
Permission to write to storage on your device is required for exporting your reading list.
The default list (%s) can\'t be deleted
%1$s deleted. The default list (%2$s) can\'t be deleted.
Lists deleted. The default list (%s) can\'t be deleted.
Add articles to a list for reading later, even when you\'re offline.
You have no articles added to this list.
Move from %s to another reading list
%s will no longer be available offline for all reading lists:
Articles saved to reading lists can now be synced to your Wikipedia account. Learn more
The article is being downloaded, and it will be available offline when complete.
Are you sure you want to delete %s?

plurals.name: reading_list_delete_lists_confirm_dialog_message
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete %d list?
Are you sure you want to delete %d lists?

resources.string: Reading list sync is off for your account, and saved articles on your logged-in devices are no longer being backed up. Turn on reading list sync in Settings.
Articles saved to reading lists can now be synced to your Wikipedia account. Learn more
Default list for your saved articles
Create lists for places to travel to, favorite topics, and much more
There is a limit of %d articles per reading list. Existing lists with more than this limit have been split into multiple lists.
Can\'t add to this list. You\'ve reached the limit of %2$d articles per list for \"%1$s\".
Can\'t create another list. You\'ve reached the limit of 100 reading lists per account.

plurals.name: reading_list_article_offline_message
plurals.item: This article will now be available offline.
These articles will now be available offline.

plurals.name: reading_list_article_not_offline_message
plurals.item: This article will no longer be available offline.
These articles will no longer be available offline.

resources.string: %d Reading list(s) have been exported as \'reading_lists export.json\' to your downloads folder
Reading lists have been exported to \'reading_lists_export.json\'
Name list and select articles to save.
You\'re all caught up on notifications!
Someone thanks you for an edit
One of your contributions was reverted
Someone mentions you in a page
Messages and replies from talk pages
Someone sent you an email through the wiki
Received when your user rights change
Received when a new link is made to a page you created
Try removing %s to see more notifications
The function is not available while offline.
What is trending today on Wikipedia
Note that not all card types are available in all Wikipedia languages. Edit your selected languages in Settings.
Select a regional language variant for an improved reading experience
You are currently using an unsupported generic Chinese language variant as your primary Wikipedia language
Summarizes an article to help readers understand the subject at a glance
Ideally one line, between two to twelve words
By starting, I promise not to misuse this feature.
The suggestions are generated by a machine, not volunteers or the Wikimedia Foundation
Customize the bottom toolbar with 5 shortcuts you find most helpful.
Drag and drop your favorite items here 👋
Hold the drag icon to move the item
Press and drag an item to reposition it
It looks like your IP address (or range of IP addresses) is currently blocked from editing Wikipedia.
Suggested edits presents opportunities for small but vital contributions to Wikipedia.
Thanks for editing Wikipedia! Why not continue where you left off?
Have a minute to continue improving Wikipedia? Check out these editing suggestions.

plurals.name: suggested_edits_contribution_seen_times
plurals.item: Seen once in the past 30 days.
Seen %s times in the past 30 days.

resources.string: Did you know that everyone can edit Wikipedia?

Suggested edits is a new way to edit Wikipedia on Android. It helps you make small but vital contributions to Wikipedia.\nOur goal is to make editing easier and more accessible for everyone! Log in or join Wikipedia to get started.
What would you like to report?
See how much time you\'ve spent reading and which articles or topics you\'ve explored over time.

We believe that you should not have to provide personal information to participate in the free knowledge movement. Usage data collected for this app is anonymous.

Learn more about our privacy policy and terms of use.
Wikipedia is a free online encyclopedia with 65 million articles collaboratively written and maintained in more than 300 languages by a community of volunteers.
We\'ve noticed the following languages on your device:
You will only see content on the Home feed and quick search filters for remaining Wikipedia languages.
Keep at least one Wikipedia language from which to search and read content.
Visible image label in the article
You can set how the media item appears on the page. This should be the thumbnail format to be consistent with other pages in almost all cases.
\'Thanks\' are an easy way to show appreciation for an editor\'s work on Wikipedia. \'Thanks\' cannot be undone and are publicly viewable
The changes made in this revision are not publicly accessible.
Are you sure you want to undo this edit?
Undoing means reverting the effects of one or more edits.
Share the reason for the revert
How did you improve this page?
This page does not belong to any categories.
No articles found in this category.
No subcategories found in this category.
Geographical coordinates are not available for this page
A reading list has been shared with you
We noticed that a reading list has been shared with you. To view this list in the app, go back to the original message and tap the link again.
Share this reading list with others
Hi! I\'d like to share my Wikipedia reading list with you:

plurals.name: talk_templates_message_delete_description
plurals.item: Are you sure you want to delete the message from the list?
Are you sure you want to delete the messages from the list?

resources.string: Contribute to the oversight and approval of Wikipedia edits.
Enhance the quality of Wikipedia content by actively reviewing a feed of recent edits and providing guidance, quality control, and encouragement to other editors.
Offer feedback, monitor edits, and take actions on the diff screen
See a productive edit? Thank a user for their contribution.
Want to track article edits? Add to your Watchlist. View it under \'More\'.
Communicate with other editors. Save commonly used talk page messages or use a template.
Choose \'Undo\' to undo or rollback a potentially destructive edit.
How can we improve the feature?
Tap on overflow menu to submit feedback anytime under \'Problem with feature\'.
Donate with Google Pay or choose another payment method.
Are you satisfied with this feature?
Are you satisfied with the \"Community\" feed?
Guess which event came first on this day in history.
You have access to a custom icon that celebrates your %d in-app contributions to Wikipedia. It will remain until the next Year in Review.
Your app icon has been updated.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_top_articles_body
plurals.item: Here was the article you visited the most in %1$d: %2$s
Here were the articles you visited the most in %1$d: %2$s

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_most_read_english_articles_body
plurals.item:
When people want to learn about our world, they turn to Wikipedia. The top %1$d visited article on English Wikipedia was: %2$s
Read more in our dedicated blog post.

When people want to learn about our world, they turn to Wikipedia. The top %1$d visited articles on English Wikipedia were: %2$s
Read more in our dedicated blog post.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_edits_viewed_times_headline
plurals.item: Your edit has been viewed more than %,d times recently
Your edits have been viewed more than %,d times recently

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_edits_viewed_times_body
plurals.item: Readers around the world appreciate your contributions. In the last 2 months, articles you\'ve edited have received %,d total view. Thanks to editors like you, Wikipedia is a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource for the world.

Readers around the world appreciate your contributions. In the last 2 months, articles you\'ve edited have received %,d total views. Thanks to editors like you, Wikipedia is a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource for the world.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_edited_per_minute_headline
plurals.item: Wikipedia was edited %,d time per minute
Wikipedia was edited %,d times per minute

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_bytes_added_body
plurals.item: In %1$d, volunteers added %2$,d byte to English Wikipedia. The sum of all their work together leads to a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource that they give to the world. All of us have knowledge to share, learn how to participate.

In %1$d, volunteers added %2$,d bytes to English Wikipedia. The sum of all their work together leads to a steadily improving, fact-based, and reliable knowledge resource that they give to the world. All of us have knowledge to share, learn how to participate.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_edited_times_body
plurals.item: Thank you for being one of the volunteer editors making a difference on Wikimedia projects around the world. Volunteers like you made %,d change across over 300 different language editions of Wikipedia.

Thank you for being one of the volunteer editors making a difference on Wikimedia projects around the world. Volunteers like you made %,d changes across over 300 different language editions of Wikipedia.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_app_edited_times_headline
plurals.item: Editors on the official Wikipedia apps made %,d edit
Editors on the official Wikipedia apps made %,d edits

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_english_edited_times_body_first
plurals.item: Volunteers made %,d change across over 300 different language editions of Wikipedia.
Volunteers made %,d changes across over 300 different language editions of Wikipedia.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_english_edited_times_body_second
plurals.item: %,d change was made on English Wikipedia. Every hour of every day, volunteers are working to improve Wikipedia.
%,d changes were made on English Wikipedia. Every hour of every day, volunteers are working to improve Wikipedia.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_saved_articles_body
plurals.item:
These articles included %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s. Each saved article reflects your interests and helps build a personalized knowledge base on Wikipedia.

Active app users had %4$,d saved article this year.

These articles included %1$s, %2$s, and %3$s. Each saved article reflects your interests and helps build a personalized knowledge base on Wikipedia.

Active app users had %4$,d saved articles this year.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_english_reading_hours_body_second
plurals.item: —around %1$,d year!—reading English Wikipedia in %2$d. Wikipedia is there when you want to learn about our changing world, win a bet among friends, or answer a curious child\'s question.
—around %1$,d years!—reading English Wikipedia in %2$d. Wikipedia is there when you want to learn about our changing world, win a bet among friends, or answer a curious child\'s question.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_available_languages_headline
plurals.item: Wikipedia was available in more than %,d language
Wikipedia was available in more than %,d languages

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_available_languages_body_second
plurals.item: across over %,d active language this year. You joined millions in expanding knowledge and exploring diverse topics.
across over %,d active languages this year. You joined millions in expanding knowledge and exploring diverse topics.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_spent_minutes_reading_body_top
plurals.item: We estimate that puts you in the top %1$s%% of Wikipedia readers globally. The average person reads %2$,d article a year.
We estimate that puts you in the top %1$s%% of Wikipedia readers globally. The average person reads %2$,d articles a year.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_spent_minutes_reading_body_global_second
plurals.item: across over %,d active language this year. You joined millions in expanding knowledge and exploring diverse topics.
across over %,d active languages this year. You joined millions in expanding knowledge and exploring diverse topics.

plurals.name: year_in_review_slide_viewed_articles_times_headline
plurals.item: App users viewed Wikipedia articles %,d time
App users viewed Wikipedia articles %,d times

plurals.name: year_in_review_highlights_logged_out_en_most_read_title
plurals.item: Most read article on English Wikipedia
Most read articles on English Wikipedia

resources.string: Discover articles picked just for you
Donate a different amount with Google Pay
This experimental feature understands natural language. Instead of searching for keywords, describe what you want to know.
Available for a limited time during this experiment.
Use one of the search examples below.
You\'ve opted out of the experiment.
When was Pluto unlisted as a planet?
Why do people put pineapple on pizza?
What are the biggest cities in Europe?
Sourced from human written Wikipedia articles
No article title matches this query.
Celebrate Wikipedia\'s 25th birthday by joining the 25-day reading challenge!
Read 1 article a day for 25 days
Join the challenge anytime between %1$s and %2$s, complete your 25 days on your own timeline.
Complete a 25-day reading streak while the challenge is live to win special prizes.
Get helpful reminders and motivation with our adorable birthday mascot Baby Globe.
Your reading history is kept protected. Reading insights are calculated using locally stored data on your device.
Log in to join the challenge
Log in or create an account to track your progress towards the reading challenge.
Baby Globe is cheering you on. Add the Reading Challenge widget to track your progress from your homescreen.
Install the Wikipedia Search widget for instant access to knowledge from your home screen.
A 25-day reading challenge is on the way.
Join the 25-day challenge and unlock special prizes.
Don\'t let today drift by, your reading streak is waiting.
Before the day snoozes away…\there\'s still time to learn something.
Even a small bit of reading counts towards your goal.
Your streak is just one article away.
Jump in for some reading anytime today.
Read one article to get started.
Your streak is just one article away.
Celebrate completing the challenge with 15%% off at the Wikipedia Store.
Explore is now Home, with a new look
The Explore feed is now Home, in the same spot as before.
Discover articles personalized to your interests in For You, or browse Wikipedia\'s best editorial content in Community.
Every recommendation tells you exactly why it\'s there. You can update your preferences anytime in Settings.
Reading in multiple languages? Each one gets its own experience. Just switch and your new feed is ready.
Select topics that interest you, and we will personalize your feed.\n\nWe collect minimal data that is anonymized.
Daily images on Wikimedia Commons, selected by volunteer contributors
Featured articles are some of the highest-quality articles on Wikipedia, selected daily by editors
Articles that have been substantially updated to reflect recent or current events of wide interest
Discover historical events from this day
Content and resources selected by and about the Wikimedia community
Turn on or off \"Community\" feed modules
Topics and articles shaping your content
Turning off a module hides it from your Community feed. You can re-enable it here at any time. Some modules may not be available in your language.
Interesting facts from articles selected by volunteer editors
Your Community feed will be empty
Turn on at least one module to see content.
Turn on Community modules to start seeing content curated by and about the Wikimedia community.
New: \"Random Article\" and \"Places of Interest\" are available in For You and \"Did You Know\" is in the Community Tab.
These topics and articles shape what appears in your \"For You\" feed. Remove any you no longer want or add new interests.
Your interests list is empty. Add something you\'re curious about.
Your reading history is empty. Start exploring articles to build personalized recommendations.
Interests updated. Refresh your feed to see updates.
Give your device a shake to jump to a random article and discover something unexpected.
